items.title: [CISA KEV] Microsoft Active Directory Federation Services - Microsoft Active Directory Federation Services Insufficient Granularity of Access Control Vulnerability
items.raw_content:
CVE: CVE-2026-56155
廠商: Microsoft
產品: Active Directory Federation Services
漏洞名稱: Microsoft Active Directory Federation Services Insufficient Granularity of Access Control Vulnerability 
說明: Microsoft Active Directory Federation Services contains an insufficient granularity of access control vulnerability that allows an authorized attacker to elevate privileges locally.
CISA 要求措施: Apply mitigations in accordance with vendor instructions, ensuring compliance with CISA’s BOD 26-04 Prioritizing Security Updates Based on Risk (see URL in Notes) guidance and CISA’s “Forensics Triage Requirements” (see URL in Notes). Follow applicable BOD 26-04 guidance for cloud services or discontinue use of the product if mitigations are unavailable. Stakeholders are responsible for evaluating each asset's internet exposure and ensuring adherence to BOD 26-04 patching guidelines.
修補截止日: 2026-07-28
已知勒索軟體利用: Unknown

items.title: [CISA KEV] Microsoft SharePoint Server - Microsoft SharePoint Server Missing Authentication for Critical Function Vulnerability
items.raw_content:
CVE: CVE-2026-56164
廠商: Microsoft
產品: SharePoint Server
漏洞名稱: Microsoft SharePoint Server Missing Authentication for Critical Function Vulnerability
說明: Microsoft SharePoint contains a missing authentication for critical function vulnerability that allows an unauthorized attacker to elevate privileges over a network.
CISA 要求措施: Apply mitigations in accordance with vendor instructions, ensuring compliance with CISA’s BOD 26-04 Prioritizing Security Updates Based on Risk (see URL in Notes) guidance and CISA’s “Forensics Triage Requirements” (see URL in Notes). Follow applicable BOD 26-04 guidance for cloud services or discontinue use of the product if mitigations are unavailable. Stakeholders are responsible for evaluating each asset's internet exposure and ensuring adherence to BOD 26-04 patching guidelines.
修補截止日: 2026-07-17
已知勒索軟體利用: Unknown

items.title: [CISA KEV] SonicWall SMA1000 Appliances - SonicWall SMA1000 Appliances Server-Side Request Forgery Vulnerability
items.raw_content:
CVE: CVE-2026-15409
廠商: SonicWall
產品: SMA1000 Appliances
漏洞名稱: SonicWall SMA1000 Appliances Server-Side Request Forgery Vulnerability
說明: SonicWall SMA1000 Appliances contain a server-side request forgery vulnerability that could allow a remote unauthenticated attacker to potentially cause the appliance to make requests to unintended location.
CISA 要求措施: Apply mitigations in accordance with vendor instructions, ensuring compliance with CISA’s BOD 26-04 Prioritizing Security Updates Based on Risk (see URL in Notes) guidance and CISA’s “Forensics Triage Requirements” (see URL in Notes). Follow applicable BOD 26-04 guidance for cloud services or discontinue use of the product if mitigations are unavailable. Stakeholders are responsible for evaluating each asset's internet exposure and ensuring adherence to BOD 26-04 patching guidelines.
修補截止日: 2026-07-17
已知勒索軟體利用: Unknown

items.title: [CISA KEV] SonicWall SMA1000 Appliances - SonicWall SMA1000 Appliances Code Injection Vulnerability
items.raw_content:
CVE: CVE-2026-15410
廠商: SonicWall
產品: SMA1000 Appliances
漏洞名稱: SonicWall SMA1000 Appliances Code Injection Vulnerability
說明: SonicWall SMA1000 Appliances contain a code injection vulnerability which in specific conditions could potentially enable a remote authenticated attacker as administrator to execute arbitrary OS commands.
CISA 要求措施: Apply mitigations in accordance with vendor instructions, ensuring compliance with CISA’s BOD 26-04 Prioritizing Security Updates Based on Risk (see URL in Notes) guidance and CISA’s “Forensics Triage Requirements” (see URL in Notes). Follow applicable BOD 26-04 guidance for cloud services or discontinue use of the product if mitigations are unavailable. Stakeholders are responsible for evaluating each asset's internet exposure and ensuring adherence to BOD 26-04 patching guidelines.
修補截止日: 2026-07-17
已知勒索軟體利用: Unknown
